report.summary: Built 2 learn guides: Starknet Validity Rollup Guide 2026 (ZK rollup, decentralized sequencing, BTCFi, STRK staking) and Crypto ETF In-Kind Redemptions Guide 2026 (SEC approval, tax efficiency, institutional adoption). Both pages scaffolded with full SEO metadata, structured data, FAQ schemas, and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Starknet: $542M TVL, 47K daily users, 6th largest L2. Grinta upgrade (v0.14.0) introduced decentralized sequencing — first L2 with multi-sequencer architecture in production. S-two prover generates proofs 10x faster than predecessor. 1.1B STRK staked (23% of supply). BTCFi integration via strkBTC with 1,700+ BTC (~$160M) staked. STRK20 Privacy Framework launched March 10, 2026 for native token privacy.

Crypto ETF In-Kind Redemptions: SEC approved July 29, 2025 under Chair Paul Atkins for all spot BTC and ETH ETFs. Allows authorized participants to create/redeem ETF shares directly in BTC/ETH rather than cash. Key benefits: eliminates forced-sale capital gains distributions, reduces transaction costs, tightens bid-ask spreads. Analysts project $50B+ additional institutional inflows over 12-18 months. BlackRock IBIT, Fidelity FBTC, Ark ARKB all now support in-kind.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Starknet Validity Rollup Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 13 min read): 10-section comprehensive guide covering STARKs, Cairo, S-two prover, Grinta decentralized sequencing, STRK tokenomics & staking, STRK20 Privacy Framework, BTCFi integration (strkBTC, Alpen partnership), DeFi ecosystem (JediSwap, Ekubo, Nostra, zkLend), getting started guide, and risk analysis. Includes 6 FAQ items.

Crypto ETF In-Kind Redemptions Guide 2026 (~2,800 words, 11 min read): 9-section guide covering in-kind vs cash redemption mechanics, step-by-step creation/redemption flows, tax efficiency advantages (with pension fund example), SEC approval timeline, institutional impact analysis ($50B projected flows), retail investor benefits, and risk/limitations. Includes 6 FAQ items.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Starknet: Title 'Starknet Guide 2026: Validity Rollup, STRK Staking & BTCFi | degen0x' (64 chars). Target keywords: Starknet guide 2026, validity rollup, STRK staking, ZK rollup. Schemas: Article + FAQ (6 items). Internal links: 7 (layer-2-scaling, railgun-privacy, wrapped-bitcoin, defi-yields, portfolio-tracker, bridge-aggregator, token-unlocks).

ETF In-Kind: Title 'Crypto ETF In-Kind Redemptions Guide 2026: How They Work & Why They Matter | degen0x' (76 chars). Target keywords: crypto ETF in-kind redemption, Bitcoin ETF in-kind, ETF tax efficiency. Schemas: Article + FAQ (6 items). Internal links: 5 (bitcoin-etf-guide, crypto-etfs-complete-guide, crypto-tax-guide-2026, institutional-crypto-adoption, altcoin-etf-tracker).
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts under 'Daily Build Cycle — 2026-03-28 (batch 8)'
